title: ilex pachyphylla
intro: Ilex pachyphylla, also known as the Chinese holly or Japanese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ilex pachyphylla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Ilex pachyphylla can be prepared as herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies for its purported therapeutic effects.
